_comment: Synthetic ADR-0007 R2 Task 3 fixture — exercises the 降着 (demotion after 審議) path. Horse 7 crossed the line 1st but impeded horse 3 in the stretch; stewards demote 7 to 2nd (降着) and promote 3 to 1st. JRA settles tickets on the POST-ADJUDICATION order, so: quinella pays on 3-7 (ascending canonical), exacta pays on 3-7 (3rd then 2nd = the corrected finish order), trifecta pays on 3-7-11. The producer's `placings` carries the corrected positions, and the demoted horse (umaban 7) stays at pos=2 with its `降着` marker in finish_position_raw — NOT moved to scratched. This is the file build_result should emit; feed to workers/social/src/settle.ts::resolveTicket to verify. Verification gap: this fixture is SYNTHETIC — constructed from JRA rule semantics, not captured from a real netkeiba result.html. The result.html parser at adapters/netkeiba_results.py reads the 着順 cell positionally; a real page may format the demoted horse's Rank cell as a bare int ('2'), as '2(降)' with a marker suffix, or via a separate annotation. Re-verify the parser against a real 降着 result.html before the capture-PC handoff (ADR-0004). See DATA_TRAPS['result_block.dq_post_adjudication_verification_gap'].
_placings_intended: 3 promoted to 1st; 7 demoted to 2nd (was 1st); 11 unchanged at 3rd
_source_umabans_in_race: 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 14 (8-declared; 7 demoted from 1st to 2nd after 審議)
_parser_input_hint: finishers = [{horse_number:3, finish_position:1, raw:''}, {horse_number:7, finish_position:2, raw:'降着'}, {horse_number:11, finish_position:3, raw:''}, ...]; the raw marker does NOT exclude the horse from placings.
